data.body: [operator-attested] LANDED. Gerrit change 658 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/658) reached LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 and was submitted; it is now MERGED on main as commit d7c5aa009 (confirmed present on origin/main after fetch). The GitHub PR #119 is now redundant and can be closed.
